song.title: Surrender
song.author: Vineyard
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D A/C# 1) I’m giving You my heart . G And all that is within. . Bm I lay it all down . A/C# D For the sake of You, my King.|| . A/C# I’m giving You my dreams. . G I’m laying down my rights. . Bm I’m giving up my pride . A/C# D For the promise of a new life.
[C] Chorus . Bm A/C# D And I___ surrender .G D Bm A/C# All to You, all to You. . Bm A/C# D And I___ surrender .G D Bm A/C# All to You, all to You.
[V2] 2) I’m giving You my life. I’m waiting at the cross. All the world holds dear I count it all as loss,|| For the sake of knowing You, For the glory of Your name, To know Your lasting joy, Even sharing in Your pain.
